summary: Privacy page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with correct teal background, cream article card, proper typography hierarchy, and all required legal content sections. The page meets core manifesto requirements and screen spec contracts.

violations.description: The 'Back to Flapjack Cloud' link and 'support@flapjack.foo' link appear to use a different color than the specified rose #b83f5f for action links and legal links at rest

actions: Verify that action links and legal links use the exact rose color #b83f5f as specified in M.palette.10
